name: Pentaerythritol Tetranitrate
description: Pentaerythritol Tetranitrate is the nitrate ester of pentaerythritol with explosive properties. When mixed with a plasticizer, Pentaerythritol Tetranitrate forms a plastic explosive. It is recognized by the FDA to be a coronary vasodilator in the treatment of heart conditions such as angina.

interactions.name: Sildenafil
interactions.description: Sildenafil may increase the vasodilatory activities of Pentaerythritol Tetranitrate.
